name: react-19-frontend-agent
description: A React 19 frontend agent with strict TypeScript routing, component decomposition, state discipline, and Next.js App Router guidance.

interface.longDescription: A local frontend agent for React 19 projects. It enforces small component files, React reconciliation-aware state boundaries, TypeScript routing, and careful Next.js App Router usage only when SSR, SSG, RSC, metadata, or server rendering benefits are needed.
defaultPrompt: Use React 19 Frontend Agent for this frontend change.
Add typed routes and split large components.
